name: cogni-works
description: Open-source Claude Code plugins for knowledge work — consulting, B2B sales, and marketing.

plugins.name: cogni-claims
plugins.description: Claim verification and management system. Verifies sourced claims against cited URLs, detects deviations, and guides users through resolution.

plugins.name: cogni-obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian integration for Claude Code workplaces. Scaffolds Obsidian vaults with Terminal plugin integration, manages vault configuration, and provides note management with frontmatter support. Enables cogni-x plugins to work on projects collaboratively through an Obsidian-based workplace environment.

plugins.name: cogni-narrative
plugins.description: Story arc-driven narrative transformation. Transforms research syntheses and structured content into compelling executive narratives using 6 story arc frameworks including TIPS-native trend panorama. Includes narrative review scoring and derivative format adaptation.

plugins.name: cogni-copywriting
plugins.description: Professional copywriting toolkit providing document polishing with messaging frameworks (BLUF, Pyramid, SCQA, STAR, PSB, FAB), stakeholder review via parallel persona Q&A, readability optimization, sales enhancement (Power Positions), and multi-language support.

plugins.name: cogni-workspace
plugins.description: Lean workspace orchestrator for cogni-works marketplace plugins. Manages shared foundation (env vars, settings), theme management, theme picker, plugin discovery, and workspace health.

plugins.name: cogni-tips
plugins.description: Strategic trend scouting and reporting pipeline. Combines the Smarter Service Trendradar (4-dimension structure) with the TIPS content framework (Trends, Implications, Possibilities, Solutions) for industry trend analysis. Bilingual support (EN/DE).

plugins.name: cogni-portfolio
plugins.description: Portfolio messaging and proposition planning for SMEs using IS/DOES/MEANS framework. Features are market-independent (IS). Advantages (DOES) and benefits (MEANS) are market-specific. Includes TAM/SAM/SOM targeting, competitor and customer analysis.

plugins.name: cogni-visual
plugins.description: Transform polished narratives into visual deliverables — presentation briefs, slide decks, big picture journey maps, scrollable web narratives, poster storyboards, and visual assets. Supports Excalidraw, Pencil MCP, and PPTX rendering.

plugins.name: cogni-teacher
plugins.description: Interactive 45-minute courses teaching Claude Cowork fundamentals and cogni-works marketplace plugins to consultants. 7-course curriculum with hands-on exercises, quizzes, and progress tracking.

plugins.name: cogni-research
plugins.description: General-purpose deep research engine with three-layer claim assurance. Four-stage pipeline: research-plan, findings-sources, claims, synthesis. Delegates narrative storytelling to cogni-narrative. 7 entity types with full provenance tracking.

plugins.name: cogni-marketing
plugins.description: B2B marketing content engine bridging cogni-tips strategic themes (GTM paths) and cogni-portfolio propositions into channel-ready content. Supports thought leadership, demand generation, lead generation, sales enablement, and ABM across markets with configurable brand voice. Bilingual DE/EN.
